title: phegopteris multilineata
intro: Phegopteris multilineata, also known as the many-lined fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the fern family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phegopteris multilineata include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Phegopteris multilineata are typically made by drying the leaves and roots, and can be consumed as tea, capsules, or infusions.
